title: Things — May/June 2024 OSU finals + summer-trip + disruption-thesis dump
html:
Things — May/June 2024 OSU finals + summer-trip + disruption-thesis dump

Source: 2024-05-13 → 2024-06-30 Apple Note. About six weeks of running todos covering OSU finals (Algos, Software 2, Cloud Dev, Info Viz, CS362), the summer India/Nepal backpack, the Shanghai study abroad visa scramble, scholarship admin with Ford and JCEF, roommate logistics with kyle and ayden, a recurring "decide on" startup-thesis menu, and the recurring self-instructions to feel and to write.

TL;DR

This note is the bridge document between Yahir-the-OSU-student and Yahir-the-China-traveler. It opens with an OpenAI announcement landing as "monumental" and ends, six weeks later, with a packing list (9 shorts, 12 underwear, 13 shirts) for Shanghai. Everything in between is the granular bureaucracy of getting out: visas, tickets, scholarship paperwork, rent transfers, a vet visit for Lola.

What's actually in here

OSU (about to graduate / finish term):

  • ALGOS midterm + HW
  • Software 2 HW + final
  • Cloud Dev assignments + final + auth assignment + group assignment
  • Info Viz HW
  • CS362 final assignment 4 demo
  • Public-speaking adjacent — takes a CRN later in 2025 05 30 todos

Summer trip (pre-China):

  • India + Nepal backpack — visas, train system research, route plan
  • Daily budget, travel-blog/IG/WordPress site, packing list
  • "wtf are we gonna do in Nepal?" — the cleanest single-line confession of pre-trip uncertainty in the corpus

Shanghai study abroad logistics:

  • Email Mei Dong re: China visa
  • Decide on China visa route
  • CIEE bill review + paperwork
  • Coordinate scholarship release with Ford (via Zane) and JCEF (via Quin)
  • "Sign up for class then drop it" — one of the funding-admin loopholes
  • "Get bag ready for Shanghai" + figure out shipping

Life logistics (Corvallis):

  • Les Schwab tire change
  • Rent transfers to Kyle / Ayden (Venmo internet bill split)
  • Decide on rooms for next year
  • Contact lenses from Costco (Central Point)
  • "Decide if you want to get a mac, sell your current computer"
  • Vet call for Lola farewell + "print out lola picture"
  • Buy Washington DC tickets (purpose unstated)
  • Buy plane ticket back for Valeria

The "decide on:" menu (repeated three times across the note — high-conviction recurrence):

  • Asset tokenization
  • Disrupting security and wasteful human interfaces — the seed of mindless human interface disruption
  • Truck driver ads
  • Smart-home integration service (Mark Cuban-inspired, added 5/19)
  • And a separate fragment: peer wager app

The "mindless boring tasks irl" inventory (with star ratings):

  • parking garage attendant ****
  • toll booth collector *****
  • security guard checking IDs
  • museum ticket seller
  • hotel security (his "original idea")
  • retail store greeter
  • stadium ticket checker
  • gym front desk verifying memberships **
  • retail cashier
  • Plus: virtual receptionist, remote patient monitoring

This is a direct lineage list to Rankett/ — Yahir cataloging the exact human jobs he wants to dissolve into software.

Quotes (load-bearing)

"OpenAI announcement — This is appearing to be a monumental moment that may decide the future of what I do, idk??"

The 5/13/24 GPT-4o demo (the ChatGPT/OpenAI launch that birthed the voice mode). Yahir flags it as the fork in his career path, then immediately goes back to his ALGOS midterm.

"Disconnected from the outcome"

Three words on their own line, right after the boring-tasks inventory. See disconnected from outcome.

"We aspire to have that level of trust with everyone we interact with… the goal of the game is to keep playing, not to cash out or take advantage of others, that the goal is to create more value than you capture."

Quoted from somewhere external (uncited). Worth its own concept page on infinite-game / value-creation ethic — probable karpathy-adjacent or VC-blog source. Slots near note as letter to self in the moral-philosophy cluster.

"Life is suffering ???"

Three-word line on its own. Bleak-curious framing — matches the same Buddhist register that surfaces in 2018 12 24 normal neutral to everything.

"write yourself a letter 1 year from now, 3 years from now, 5 years from now, 10 years from now, 20 years from now."

Repeats verbatim across at least three date headers — see letter to future self.

"feel your emotions, do not block them off. Recognize what is happening within you"

Same line, also repeated multiple times. See feel your emotions.

Other Sophie reference

He bookmarked Sophie Fuji's decisions.html and travels.html as "fire blogs" — direct stylistic / life-template influence on his own writing aspirations.

Open questions

  • Which of the four "decide on" theses won? (Probably none of them directly — but the disruption thread feeds Rankett.)
  • Was there a Washington DC trip, and what for?
  • The phone number 5412272993 and Amazon-looking tracking number 9200190237568608471802 — both unannotated, both worth flagging in case they matter.
  • "Print out lola picture" reads as commemorative — was Lola a dog?

Privacy / leaks

  • Phone number 5412272993 and a USPS-style tracking number sit unannotated in the raw. Low risk but worth knowing.
  • Multiple personal contacts (Mei Dong, Quin, Zane) named only by first name — fine.

Related

  • 2024 12 21 todos
  • 2024 09 05 shanghai sidequests

  • letter to future self
  • feel your emotions
  • rankett
